scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run typecheck && PORT=23671 BASE_PATH=/ corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/commodities run build && corepack pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm run typecheck:libs && corepack pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
